falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low formation; a break below 4,800 would violate the structural support level of that bottom pattern and invalidate the bullish reversal thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained VIX elevation above 25 would indicate genuine panic rather than the controlled consolidation implied by a BLOWOFF SCORE of 39; this would prove the current 'HOLD' signal was masking an underlying risk-off regime change

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 simultaneously trades below its 20-day moving average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination would signal a flight-to-safety recessionary dynamic rather than the growth-scare-bottom pattern of August 2024; the correlation breakdown would falsify the pattern match as a false analog

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
